name: Dirty Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince onion, bell pepper, celery, and garlic.
2. Grind livers and gizzards.
3. Place fat, gizzards, pork, and bay leaves in a large heavy skillet over high heat; cook until meat is thoroughly browned, about 6 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the minced vegetables, Tabasco, salt, pepper, paprika, mustard, cumin, thyme, and oregano. Stir thoroughly, scraping the pan bottom well.
5. Add butter and stir until melted.
6. Reduce heat to medium; cook about 8 minutes, stirring constantly and scraping the pan bottom well.
7. Add stock or water and stir until any mixture sticking to the pan bottom comes loose; cook about 8 minutes over high heat, stirring once.
8. Stir in chicken livers and cook about 2 minutes.
9. Add rice and stir thoroughly; cover pan and turn heat to very low.
10. Cook about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and leave covered until rice is tender, about 10 minutes. Discard bay leaves before serving.
